title: City of Shafter, Calfornia, Advances Membership with First Public Hydrogen Authority (FPH2)
content: The First Public Hydrogen Authority (FPH2) announced that the City of Shafter has approved proceeding with its membership in FPH2. The FPH2 Board of Directors will consider the item for approval at the December 18 board meeting and, as such, it is not yet final. The partnership underscores growing statewide momentum for hydrogen deployment and highlights Shafterâ€™s leadership in advancing clean industry and economic growth. â€œWe are proud to welcome the City of Shafter as they take this important step toward joining FPH2,â€ said FPH2 Chairman R. Rex Parris. â€œShafterâ€™s forward-thinking leadership is helping build the framework for Californiaâ€™s clean hydrogen network. Their participation supports local job creation, infrastructure investment, and the transition to zero-emission technologies.â€
author: Analysts Account
